title: lighting-pass
summary: Replaced ad-hoc 2-light setup with layered lighting per design-note: 1 key (warm cream #ffd9b0, top-down at room center, intensity 0.8 / dist 6), 1 fill (cool lavender #93c5fd, entry-side bounce, 0.4 / 9), 1 hero accent (cyan #22d3ee on glass display case, 0.7 / 5), and 5 per-station accents (1 shared mint-cyan #5eead4 covering stations 0+1, plus per-station accents on stations 2-5 driven by STATIONS[i].accent). Total runtime <pointLight> = 8 (cap). grep count = 5 JSX tags (one is a .map over 4 indices). All static — no per-frame intensity. No #FFFFFF. accentLightRef preserved on hero accent. Removed unused ACCENT_LIGHT_BASE constant.
